name: ember-code-vscode
description: Ember Code AI coding assistant — chat panel backed by the local Ember backend

emberCode.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter with ignite-ember installed (e.g. a venv's bin/python).

scripts.build:ui: npm --prefix ../web run build && rm -rf media && cp -r ../web/dist media
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run compile
